scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web,tauri "npm --prefix ../.. run dev --workspace=@autoextraction/api" "npm --prefix ../.. run dev --workspace=@autoextraction/web" "tauri dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace=@autoextraction/api && npm --prefix ../.. run build --workspace=@autoextraction/web && tauri build
scripts.build:win: npm run prepare:win && tauri build --bundles nsis
